creator: ericturgeon.bsd@gmail.com
text:
I approve the patch for audio/lxmusic.


On Thu, Jun 20, 2013 at 1:00 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of audio/lxmusic,
>
> Please note that PR ports/179775 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179775
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



-- 
*Eric Turgeon
**GhostBSD project*
